title: 风险避坑：Stripe 平台规则变化
original_title: Rethinking risk in the age of AI
summary: Join senior risk and payments leaders in Seattle to explore how AI is reshaping fraud strategy. Seats are limited.
topic_direction_description: 跨境支付、海外平台、独立站、电商、合规、收款和出海基础设施。重点看普通技术人有没有能理解、能验证、能低成本试错的切入口。
